'''bafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foalhood|foalhood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foalhood|foalhood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bafaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæfækæth|bæfækæth]] || [[word:bæfækæj|bæfækæj]] || [[word:bæfækæsh|bæfækæsh]] || [[word:bæfækæ|bæfækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bafafakath|bafafakath]] || [[word:bafafakaj|bafafakaj]] || [[word:bafafakash|bafafakash]] || [[word:bafafaka|bafafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bafakath|bafakath]] || [[word:bafakaj|bafakaj]] || [[word:bafakash|bafakash]] || [[word:bafaka|bafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bafafkath|bafafkath]] || [[word:bafafkaj|bafafkaj]] || [[word:bafafkash|bafafkash]] || [[word:bafafkaf|bafafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bafakatha|bafakatha]] || [[word:bafakaja|bafakaja]] || [[word:bafakasha|bafakasha]] || [[word:bafakaka|bafakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bafakath|bafakath]] || [[word:bafakaj|bafakaj]] || [[word:bafakash|bafakash]] || [[word:bafaka|bafaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bafakathal|bafakathal]] || [[word:bafakajal|bafakajal]] || [[word:bafakashal|bafakashal]] || [[word:bafakakal|bafakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bafakathatha|bafakathatha]] || [[word:bafakajaja|bafakajaja]] || [[word:bafakashasha|bafakashasha]] || [[word:bafakaka|bafakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bafakathan|bafakathan]] || [[word:bafakajan|bafakajan]] || [[word:bafakashan|bafakashan]] || [[word:bafakakan|bafakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bafakathaoro|bafakathaoro]] || [[word:bafakajaoro|bafakajaoro]] || [[word:bafakashaoro|bafakashaoro]] || [[word:bafakakaoro|bafakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
